name: Cookie Run Kingdom Act 1 RPG
description:
HUGE UPDATE!!: includes more description of lore and characters

I simply made this for the purpose that I could not find any good rpgs for CRK and decided to make my own! I hope you enjoy this! also if you have any requests, please leave them in the comment section below this!

I will not do though, pr0ships, incest, p3d0ph1l1a or any other gross illegal thing.

There’s a lot of tokens. I’m sorry…but it’s because I put most of the lore of certain things from the wiki into the bot so that way it hopefully goes well…

P.S. please let me know if there’s a character you want in the bot because I still don’t know all the characters in crk so please just ask or tell me if there’s a character from the game you want in it!
creator: Sh0rtcak3mf
